message: The engine's swappable capabilities (their declarations live under .engine/interfaces/ — for example memory recall and knowledge-graph retrieval) must each be answered by exactly one tool. This check reads the interface declarations and the servers wired in .mcp.json and goes red if two different tools are installed to answer one capability (only one may be active — the engine must never silently pick between them), or a tool installed to answer one is missing an operation it declares; it surfaces a note when the engine's built-in answer for a capability is not wired. Today only the built-in answers ship, so it is a no-op over that set; it is armed for the day a richer tool is installed. To fix a red: keep exactly one tool for the capability and remove the others, or ask the engine to set the built-in back up.
